sources.name: YgoCombo
sources.scale: 86 combo guides · 13,477 deck pages · 693 archetype pages
sources.description: Turn-by-turn combo guides reconstructed from real duel replays, including opening hands, activations, and end boards.
sources.importPolicy: Link and manually transcribe with attribution or permission

sources.name: Open Combo Codex
sources.description: Community-authored combo routes stored as structured Markdown, with engines, prerequisites, steps, and end boards.
sources.importPolicy: Imported as attributed community guides; not represented as executable DLN

sources.name: YGOPLUS
sources.scale: Searchable end boards and opening hands
sources.description: A community deck and combo workspace for exploring lines by opening hand, interaction, and resulting board.
sources.importPolicy: Discovery links; verify an individual route before transcription

sources.name: YGO Combo Builder
sources.description: A visual route-building and publishing tool. Its public gallery is dynamic, so the claimed total was not independently enumerated in this audit.
sources.importPolicy: Discovery only until route provenance and access are verified

sources.name: YGOPRODeck
sources.scale: Large public deck database and card API
sources.description: Useful for deck lists, card identity, and primer context. It is a supporting source rather than a turn-by-turn combo database.
sources.license: API terms apply; card imagery belongs to its rights holders
sources.importPolicy: Use for card resolution and deck context, not inferred combo steps
